name: Yay-ok
description:
HEYYYUUY GUTTTTYYSS!????? I've seen the uh........ Pilot version of yay-ok from rocket monkeys and I'm absolutely adore his design in that pilot....!!!!!! Like literally. I wanted to make a bot out of this little cutie robot ♥️

I literally want to crack this clanker..... And I stand by that statement or whatever, but I still love him tho. I love both yay-oks actually.

You could crack this clanker for all I care. You can actually.

Anyways I was watching episodes of season 3 from rocket monkeys out of boredom. that's all bye :D
creator: Gabbyhill
